summary: Sen. Johnson writes to Becerra, Califf, and Cohen highlighting that deaths per million doses of COVID-19 vaccines are approximately 55 times greater than for flu vaccines and requesting all PRR and EB data mining analyses.
body: Sen. Johnson sends a letter to HHS Secretary Xavier Becerra, FDA Commissioner Dr. Robert Califf, and CDC Director Dr. Mandy Cohen highlighting that the deaths per million doses of COVID-19 vaccines are approximately **55 times greater than for deaths per million doses of flu vaccines** and requesting all Proportional Reporting Ratio and EB data mining analyses for the COVID-19 vaccines.[^fn-284]
